title: Volex Vitality Crystals
description: Explore your world to attain special items that grant additional max life.
body:
![VVC_Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea49866553fd226dd9099fdb18674ddce8ecd04a.png)
# A simple and small mod that adds maximum health providing items inspired by Terraria's "Life Crystals".

**![Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c519c2146395f93fe7d74c1d2b615e0905009f29.png) Vitality Crystal:**
Spawns commonly undergrond in the overworld in any biome on all axis' of the walls.\
_Cosume up to 10 for a total of 40HP._

**![berry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55ee71cca083aa39323264eea4147066264b578e.png) Life Berry:**
Spawns rarely in lush caves embedded in the tip of cave vines.\
_Cosume up to 5 for a total of 50HP._

**![soul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57ab540725eb2218e065055f08a3a8e4bfe7729c.png) Spectre Soul:**
Spawns rarely in soul sand valleys hanging from the ceiling.\
_Consume up to 5 for a total of 60HP_

_Created with MCreator._
